chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No.330 of 2013 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing / priority 1. For order on CMA No.2101/2013 2. For hearing of main case 1. For hearing of CMA No.2102/2013 16.04.2026 None present. Matter is pending since 2013 without any progress. Even today, the applicant remains unrepresented without any intimation and justification. It appears that the applicant-department is no longer interested in proceeding with this reference, therefore, in view of the judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
